mapper.insert: /* TM_ECS_INTN_USR_ATHR_Dao_insertUsrAhtrGrpMng */ INSERT INTO tm_ecs_intn_usr_athr ( usr_id, athr_id, applc_strt_de, applc_end_de, frst_regist_dt, frst_rgstr_id, last_updt_dt, last_updusr_id ) VALUES ( #{usrId}, #{athrId}, #{applcStrtDe}, #{applcEndDe}, SYSDATE, #{frstRgstrId}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdusrId} )

/* TM_ECS_INTN_USR_ATHR_Dao_mergeUsrAhtrGrpMng */ MERGE INTO tm_ecs_intn_usr_athr USING DUAL ON ( usr_id = #{usrId} AND athr_id = #{athrId} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET applc_strt_de = #{applcStrtDe}, applc_end_de = #{applcEndDe}, last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, last_updusr_id = #{lastUpdusrId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( usr_id, athr_id, applc_strt_de, applc_end_de, frst_regist_dt, frst_rgstr_id, last_updt_dt, last_updusr_id ) VALUES ( #{usrId}, #{athrId}, #{applcStrtDe}, #{applcEndDe}, SYSDATE, #{frstRgstrId}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdusrId} )
mapper.select: /* 버튼 권한 조회 */ /* TM_ECS_INTN_USR_ATHR_Dao_retrieveMenuBtnAthr */ SELECT DISTINCT btn_athr_list FROM ( (SELECT BTN_ATHR_LIST FROM tm_ecs_intn_athr_menu A, tm_ecs_intn_menu B WHERE A.menu_id = B.menu_id AND A.athr_id IN ( SELECT ATHR_ID FROM tm_ecs_intn_usr_athr WHERE USR_ID = #{usrId} UNION ALL SELECT #{intnSysDivCd} || 'GN01' FROM tm_ecs_intn_usr_athr WHERE 1 = 1 /* TODO: 운영에선 용역제외 */ ) AND B.menu_sys_div_cd = #{intnSysDivCd} AND B.scrin_id = #{scrinId} AND btn_athr_list IS NOT NULL ) UNION ALL ( SELECT btn_athr_list FROM tm_ecs_intn_usr_menu A, tm_ecs_intn_menu B WHERE A.menu_id = B.menu_id AND A.usr_id = #{usrId} AND B.menu_sys_div_cd = #{intnSysDivCd} AND B.scrin_id = #{scrinId} AND btn_athr_list IS NOT NULL ) )
